reviews.review_description: Anyone else get the door opened with the flies buzzing behind it?

reviews.review_title: I dont know how kill monsters
reviews.review_description:
I move the vr pad to the direction I see at monsters and I cant kill them
 Please help me

developer_response.body: In this game you can't kill monsters, it's no bug ;)

reviews.review_description: The game does not have stereo 3d, a key ingredient in vr. Whether this is a bug or intentional i do not know.
Fails the bare minimum standard for VR. Tried to give one star but am unable to for whatever reason.
Nice story which is really makes you continue playing ! Controls are quite odd but I guess it is because it is coming from a pc port and is quite old title

Great graphics and controls. Probably the best I've experienced in a gear vr game so far. The story is ok but nothing original. 

The first half was really scary, but I think the scariness faded out afterwards. Relied a little too much on jumpscares imo. Still deserve 5/5 no doubt. I will definitly buy episode 2.
Not as good as dread halls or dark days but it's still pretty cool
It crashed on my second attempt and over heated my phone can you please fix

reviews.review_title: Wow. It’s the same version from the Rift
reviews.review_description:
This is an example of what porting VR games should be. Simplify for the single controller. Give the ability to free walk. Tone the textures down so it runs at a great frame rate on a portable device and that’s a recipe for a mostly perfect portable experience. 

Could the textures use a little more bump in quality, absolutely, but it does not detract too much from my score.I couldn’t of asked for a better mobile treatment. Oculus Go devs take notes on this one.

This port is still worth the full asking price, but if you are reading this and it’s still a dollar and like horror buy immediately!

reviews.review_title: dear developer, is this a bug...
reviews.review_description: ...or why the heck is the game not in stereo 3D. cannot play like this, so please fix! I'm waiting for a reply; thx!
This game had a pretty good story. Had me jump a couple of times but not that bad. Took me less than an hour to beat. Overall good for the money paid.
I realy enjoyed this game  jumped  a few times  now for part  2 keep up the brill work more like this please  5 stars all round
No 3D depth on Oculus Go, no VR immersion possible.

So this game has just a couple things hiding im not a negative person for example if i play a just terrible game i usually wont comment about it but there still is a couple things i should point out for example if your a oculus go or (im assuming gearVR) ignore the video because like almost every game that was ported over from a higher end VR set the video they show is that platform unless its mobile chipset exclusive game then the videos are misleading this games strength is its gameplay and story NOT the graphics if you look at anything close its very muddy and textured but all together it works and its under 5$ guys not a 60$ ps4 game and it and episide 2 are quite deffinatly worth the price of admission just basically ignore the video lol but all and all nice work easy 4.5
I just bought this game and I was excited for it but when I purchased it, it downloaded then just reset and it says install but it won't install and I can't play it.
